# EuroRust

EuroRust is an annual conference for the European Rust community. EuroRust 2026 runs from October 14–17, 2026, in Barcelona and online. Workshops and side activities begin on October 14. The conference takes place on October 15–16 at Auditori L’illa, Av. Diagonal, 547, 08029 Barcelona, Spain. Community activities continue on October 17.

## Core event information

- [EuroRust website](https://eurorust.eu/): Official website for EuroRust 2026, held in Barcelona and online from October 14–17, 2026.
- [Schedule](https://eurorust.eu/schedule/): Full schedule for workshops, talks, side activities, and community events.
- [Tickets and registration](https://www.tickettailor.com/events/eurorust/2022388): Ticket options and registration for on-site and online attendance.

## Talks and speakers

- [Move your problems to compile-time and get new capabilities out of it](https://eurorust.eu/talks/move-your-problems/): Talk by Oli Scherer on October 15, 2026, 10:00–10:45.
- [Compiling the Linux kernel with gccrs](https://eurorust.eu/talks/compiling-the-linux-kernel-with-gccrs/): Talk by Arthur Cohen and Pierre-Emmanuel Patry on October 15, 2026, 11:00–11:30.
- [What's next for Rust's type system](https://eurorust.eu/talks/what-s-next-for-rust-s-type-system/): Talk by lcnr on October 15, 2026, 11:00–11:30.
- [Shipping Temporal: How the Rust Ecosystem Built Chrome’s Newest Web API](https://eurorust.eu/talks/shipping-temporal-how-the-rust-ecosystem-built-chrome-s-newest-web-api/): Talk by Shane Carr on October 15, 2026, 11:45–12:15.
- [Optimizing rustc's Next Trait Solver](https://eurorust.eu/talks/optimizing-the-new-rust-trait-solver/): Talk by Jana Dönszelmann on October 15, 2026, 11:45–12:15.
- [Tales from the Embedded Rust Frontier: Bootstrapping a brand new ecosystem](https://eurorust.eu/talks/tales-from-the-embedded-rust-frontier-bootstrapping-a-brand-new-ecosystem/): Talk by Jonathan Pallant on October 15, 2026, 13:45–14:15.
- [Building a Query System](https://eurorust.eu/talks/building-a-query-system/): Talk by Arya Dradjica on October 15, 2026, 13:45–14:15.
- [From Hardware to Human Interface: Building HID Devices in Rust](https://eurorust.eu/talks/from-hardware-to-human-interface-building-hid-devices-in-rust/): Talk by Frank Lyaruu on October 15, 2026, 14:30–15:00.
- [Rebuilding the Tower of Babel – Write Your Own Language Server with Tree-sitter](https://eurorust.eu/talks/rebuilding-the-tower-of-babel-write-your-own-language-server-with-tree-sitter/): Talk by Timo Bachmann on October 15, 2026, 14:30–15:00.
- [Running Safely with Scissors: Lock-free Concurrency for Maximum Throughput](https://eurorust.eu/talks/running-safely-with-scissors-lock-free-concurrency-for-maximum-throughput/): Talk by Filip Petkovski on October 15, 2026, 15:15–15:45.
- [Lessons from building a background task processing library](https://eurorust.eu/talks/lessons-from-building-a-background-task-processing-library/): Talk by Njuguna Mureithi on October 15, 2026, 15:15–15:45.
- [Game Show](https://eurorust.eu/talks/game-show/): Talk by Amos Wenger and Tris Oaten on October 15, 2026, 16:15–16:45.
- [Inside Cloud Hypervisor: From KVM to a Running VM](https://eurorust.eu/talks/inside-cloud-hypervisor-from-kvm-to-a-running-vm/): Talk by Philipp Schuster on October 15, 2026, 17:00–17:30.
- [Image codecs rustification in Chromium](https://eurorust.eu/talks/image-codecs-rustification-in-chromium/): Talk by Johan Rosengren and Sergio Gonzalez Martin on October 15, 2026, 17:45–18:30.
- [Rust's Influence on C++ and Python: Shaping the Future of Three Communities](https://eurorust.eu/talks/rust-s-influence-on-c-and-python-shaping-the-future-of-three-communities/): Talk by Cristián Maureira-Fredes on October 16, 2026, 10:00–10:45.
- [Blastbeat: When a Decade of C++ Meets Rust and io_uring](https://eurorust.eu/talks/blastbeat-when-a-decade-of-c-meets-rust-and-io-uring/): Talk by Daniel Rodriguez and Giacomo Bagnoli on October 16, 2026, 11:00–11:30.
- [Designing State Machines for Streaming Proxies in Rust](https://eurorust.eu/talks/designing-state-machines-for-streaming-proxies-in-rust/): Talk by Sanskar Jaiswal on October 16, 2026, 11:00–11:30.
- [Qt Bridges: Bringing a mature C++ UI framework to Rust](https://eurorust.eu/talks/qt-bridges-bringing-a-mature-c-ui-framework-to-rust/): Talk by Matthias Rauter on October 16, 2026, 11:45–12:15.
- [Supply Chain Attacks, and how to protect ourselves](https://eurorust.eu/talks/supply-chain-attacks-and-how-to-protect-ourselves/): Talk by Francois Mockers on October 16, 2026, 11:45–12:15.
- [How I built a file search that is 50x faster than ripgrep and made it into opencode](https://eurorust.eu/talks/how-i-built-a-file-search-that-is-50x-faster-than-ripgrep-and-made-it-into-opencode/): Talk by Dmitriy Kovalenko on October 16, 2026, 13:45–14:15.
- [Vortex: One Format for Any Shape](https://eurorust.eu/talks/vortex-one-format-for-any-shape/): Talk by Connor Tsui on October 16, 2026, 13:45–14:15.
- [Atomic Design Patterns in Rust: From Orderings to Code](https://eurorust.eu/talks/atomic-design-patterns-in-rust-from-orderings-to-code/): Talk by Martin Ombura Jr. on October 16, 2026, 14:30–15:00.
- [Moving a quantum compiler from Python to Rust](https://eurorust.eu/talks/moving-a-quantum-compiler-from-python-to-rust/): Talk by Jake Lishman on October 16, 2026, 14:30–15:00.
- [Building a high performance, thread-per-core, zero-copy OpenTelemetry engine in Rust](https://eurorust.eu/talks/building-a-high-performance-thread-per-core-zero-copy-opentelemetry-engine-in-rust/): Talk by Albert Lockett on October 16, 2026, 15:15–15:45.
- [From Deref Into Borrow, a Primer on Standard Library Traits](https://eurorust.eu/talks/from-deref-into-borrow-a-primer-on-standard-library-traits/): Talk by Andre Bogus on October 16, 2026, 16:15–16:45.
- [Beyond Flamegraphs: Precise Rust Profiling with hotpath-rs](https://eurorust.eu/talks/beyond-flamegraphs-precise-rust-profiling-with-hotpath-rs/): Talk by Paweł Urbanek on October 16, 2026, 17:00–17:30.
- [Beyond cargo build](https://eurorust.eu/talks/beyond-cargo-build/): Talk by Amos Wenger on October 16, 2026, 17:45–18:30.

## Workshops

- [C→Rust, Beyond the Basics](https://eurorust.eu/workshops/c-to-rust/): Workshop on October 14, 2026, 10:00–16:00.
- [Containers Are Dead: Long Live WebAssembly](https://eurorust.eu/workshops/containers-are-dead/): Workshop on October 14, 2026, 10:00–16:00.
- [Programming a Line Follower Robot](https://eurorust.eu/workshops/programming-a-line-follower-robot/): Workshop on October 14, 2026, 10:00–16:00.
- [Hands-On Embedded Rust](https://eurorust.eu/workshops/hands-on-embedded-rust/): Workshop on October 14, 2026, 10:00–16:00.

## Side activities

- [Barcelona Bike Tour](https://eurorust.eu/activities/bike-tour/): Side activity on October 14, 2026, 14:30–17:30.
- [Barcelona Sunset Catamaran Tour](https://eurorust.eu/activities/boat-tour/): Side activity on October 14, 2026, 18:30–20:00.
- [Spanish Wine and Tapas Tasting](https://eurorust.eu/activities/wine-tasting/): Side activity on October 14, 2026, 18:30–20:00.
- [Group Dinners: Meet & Eat!](https://eurorust.eu/activities/group-dinner/): Side activity on October 15, 2026, 20:00.
- [Karaoke Night](https://eurorust.eu/activities/karaoke/): Side activity on October 15, 2026, 21:00–23:00.
- [impl Day/Unconference](https://eurorust.eu/activities/impl-day/): Side activity on October 17, 2026, 10:00–16:00.
- [Museu Nacional d'Art de Catalunya Private Tour](https://eurorust.eu/activities/museum-tour/): Side activity on October 17, 2026, 13:00–15:00.

## Venue and attendee information

- [Venue and travel](https://eurorust.eu/travel/): Venue address, public transport, travel, accessibility, and visa information.
- [Code of Conduct](https://eurorust.eu/code-of-conduct/): Conduct requirements and anti-harassment policy for all participants.
- [Accessibility statement](https://eurorust.eu/accessibility/): Accessibility measures, ticket support, and contact information for assistance.
- [Health and safety policy](https://eurorust.eu/health-safety-policy/): Health and safety guidance for on-site attendees and participants.
- [Cancellation policy](https://eurorust.eu/cancellation/): Refund, ticket reassignment, and event cancellation terms.

## Sponsorship

- [EuroRust 2026 sponsorship prospectus](https://eurorust.eu/2026-sponsorship-prospectus.pdf): Sponsorship packages, benefits, pricing, and contact information.

## Contact

- [Email EuroRust](mailto:mail@eurorust.eu): Contact the organizers about attendance, accessibility, travel, visas, or sponsorship.
